scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run build-icons && npm run package:win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run build-icons && npm run package:mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run build-icons && npm run package:linux
scripts.zip:win: npm run dist:win   && node scripts/zip.js release/goSurf-win32-x64  release/goSurf-win-x64.zip
scripts.zip:mac: npm run dist:mac   && node scripts/zip.js release/goSurf-darwin-x64 release/goSurf-mac-x64.zip
scripts.zip:linux: npm run dist:linux && node scripts/zip.js release/goSurf-linux-x64  release/goSurf-linux-x64.zip
scripts.zip:all: npm run build && npm run package:win && npm run package:mac && npm run package:linux && node scripts/zip.js release/goSurf-win32-x64 release/goSurf-win-x64.zip && node scripts/zip.js release/goSurf-darwin-x64 release/goSurf-mac-x64.zip && node scripts/zip.js release/goSurf-linux-x64 release/goSurf-linux-x64.zip
